mnemonics.title: Bias-Variance Balance
mnemonics.content: Bias Blind, Variance Vain - Balance Both Beats Error!

acronyms.usage: Remember error components: B² + V + ε

visualTips.visualization: Imagine U-shaped total error curve with bias² and variance arms

analogies.analogy: Like microscope focus - too simple (blurry/bias), too complex (noisy details/variance)
